What is it!?

The conception

{David Attenborough voice}


In the intricate ballet of creation, two seemingly disparate entities embark on a journey of profound transformation. Here, we witness a remarkable event in the world of digital finance a merger so rare, it's almost mythical.


Observe closely, as the agile XRP, sleek and dynamic, represents the very essence of innovation. With purpose and precision, it approaches the enigmatic PEPE, an icon of internet culture, embodying both whimsy and widespread appeal.


As XRP nears PEPE, the stage is set for a fusion of unprecedented creativity. In this grand spectacle, XRP gracefully engages with PEPE, their energies converging in a moment of perfect synergy. Like the merging of sperm and egg in the natural world, this union heralds the birth of something extraordinary.


And thus, from this extraordinary confluence, emerges a new entity: XRPEPE. A synthesis of technology and culture, a blend of the avant-garde and the iconic. Witness the dawn of a new era, where digital realms and internet folklore unite to create a token as unique as the process that brought it to life.


In the grand tapestry of innovation, this moment will be remembered as the genesis of XRPEPE a testament to the boundless possibilities when disparate forces come together in harmony.

The best of both worlds!

X R P will be the news ~ PEPE will be the meme. A new meta is coming and XRPEPE is the narrative like no other.


Who? What?

Australian Team

Artificial Inteligence

Australian Team

Dedicated and trusted Australian team with years of experience in marketing through to programming.

Memes

Artificial Inteligence

Australian Team

Combining the most recognised symbols in the industry to create powerful content that resonates with trending news.

Artificial Inteligence

Artificial Inteligence

Artificial Inteligence

Lead dev has successfully solved real world problems with Ai ~ which will be used to benefit the growth of XRPEPE.

Ai?

It is more than just a meme token...


XRPEPE has a team that can code programs and engineer artificial intelligence. From a Telegram and X bot, with a cheeky character through to custom programs that can be adopted by multiple projects, there are no limits. XRPEPE Ai is a department of the XRPEPE token that turns the IMPOSSIBLE into the IMPOSSIBLE. 

Linked website coming soon.

Wen?

Not if but wen.

Not if but wen.

Not if but wen.

XRPEPE has a long journey ahead which will be taken step by step.

Community.

Not if but wen.

Not if but wen.

Establishing true early holders and to release 10% token supply on the 31st of August 2024 into a multiSIG community controlled wallet.

Wen?

Not if but wen.

Wen?

XRP settlement is nearing which then creates the question wen etf?


Many more steps ahead.

How?

Create a wallet

Create a wallet

Create a wallet

Download metamask or your wallet of choice from the app store or google play store for free. Desktop users, download the google chrome extension by going to metamask.io.

Ethereum

Create a wallet

Create a wallet

Have ethereum available. This can be purchased directly through metamask or transferred from an exchange to your wallet.

Uniswap

Create a wallet

Uniswap

Connect your wallet to uniswap. Copy and paste the XRPEPE contract which then you will have to confirm. Then proceed to swap ethereum for XRPEPE with zero tax.
